About GVL Limo

Built on trust.
Driven by standards.

Greenville Executive Limo Service is the Upstate's premier transportation company. Fully licensed in five states. Available 24/7. The only SLED-licensed armed transport in South Carolina.

"Our rates will surprise you. Our service will exceed every expectation."

Looking for affordable, professional limousine rental or executive car service in Greenville, South Carolina? From airport rides to Hilton Head trips, from weddings to corporate events — our lineup of vehicles is here to serve you with whatever you need.

We are with you every step of the way. Confirmation emails, driver details before pickup, live text alerts when your driver is en route, and real-time updates when they arrive. That's not a premium add-on. That's every single ride.

Credentials

Safety Protocols

Safety isn't a feature.
It's the foundation.

Vetted Drivers

Criminal & driving record background checks. Drug testing. DOT physicals. No exceptions, no shortcuts.

Monitored Fleet

Every vehicle: video recording, GPS tracking, speed monitoring. Real-time oversight on every trip.

Emergency Ready

North American Rescue "Stop the Bleed" crisis kits in every vehicle. Drivers trained in proper use by NAR.

Always Connected

Radio-equipped fleet with earpieces for hands-free dispatch. Never out of contact, never distracted.

GVL SAFE

Armed executive
protection transport

The only company in South Carolina currently licensed under SLED to provide secure armed transportation. SLED License #4044.

All personnel: SLED-licensed private security agents with concealed armed certifications. Law enforcement background required. Training crafted by industry professionals from Secret Service members to Navy SEALs.

Lead Security Officers

Eric Baade

Recently retired police sergeant. 26 years of law enforcement experience. Distinguished Service Award. Ben Ali Shriners Award for Law Enforcement Excellence.

Isaac Yopp

13 years public service: SC State Trooper, EMT, Firefighter. 2 years as firearms instructor. 6 years CERT. Recognized by Governor Kasich for work at 2016 RNC.

"33% of CEOs have received physical threats. VIPs are most at risk when leaving their home and while entering the office."

— Center for Protective Intelligence
Request GVL SAFE
FAQ

Common questions

How do I book a ride?

Book online through our site, download our app, or call (864) 920-3342. You'll receive an instant confirmation email and a receipt for the 25% non-refundable deposit.

What's your cancellation policy?

25% deposit is non-refundable and reserves your date. Cancel before the day prior to your trip and you won't be charged the remaining balance. Post-invoice cancellations are non-refundable.

What if my flight is delayed?

Delayed commercial flights (same flight number) are tracked at no additional charge. Flight cancellations receive a 40% credit toward rescheduled trips.

What payment methods do you accept?

Credit cards only. We do not accept cash or checks.

Where do you operate?

Licensed in SC, NC, GA, TN and throughout the U.S. Primary service areas include Greenville, Spartanburg, Asheville, Clemson, Anderson, Charlotte, Atlanta, and everywhere in between.

Is there a wait-time fee?

5 minutes of grace time. After that, no-show charges apply. Hourly services that exceed 10+ minutes incur an additional hourly charge.
